event: admitted to the hospital for HSCT
genetic studies showing four-base-pair deletion in intron-8
no protein expression of WAS by flow cytometry
required two platelet transfusions during 1st year
no significant history of infection before transplantation
admitted at 13 months for preconditioning therapy
preconditioning therapy with fludarabine, melphalan, thiotepa, and antithymocyte globulin
admitted to Pediatric Intensive Care Unit on HD#8
cannulated with 14-French arterial cannula in right carotid artery
14-French venous cannula in right internal jugular vein
echocardiogram after cannulation showed severely diminished left ventricular function
inotropic support weaned off within 72 hours after cannulation
received unrelated HLA donor stem cell transplant through ECMO circuit on HD#10
ABO-mismatched cord blood transplant (8/10, A antigen, DQB1 allele)
cord blood infused on arterial side postoxygenator over 40 minutes
emergent head CT showing acute intraparenchymal hemorrhages
4 mm right to left midline shift
brain MRI on HD#16 showed stable occipital lobe hematomas
watershed infarction along right parasagittal centrum semiovale
signs of engraftment on HD#22 (day +12 post-HSCT)
fluorescence in situ hybridization XY showed 100% donor cells on HD#40 (day +30 post-HSCT)
transitioned to peritoneal dialysis on HD#57
discharged to the floor on HD#69
peritoneal catheter removed 10 days after discharge
recovered from neurologic injury with no sequelae
no signs of chronic graft versus host disease
